content.content:
Web search results for query: "CSS masonry layout specification "grid-template-rows: masonry" OR "display: grid-lanes" 2025 2026"

Links: [{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS - MDN Web Docs","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes (Masonry Layout) Is Here: A Complete Guide for 2026 - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/bean_bean/css-grid-lanes-masonry-layout-is-here-a-complete-guide-for-2026-4686"},{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS | MDN","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes: The New Native Masonry Layout","url":"https://blog.openreplay.com/css-grid-lanes-masonry-layout/"},{"title":"Creating a Responsive Pure CSS Masonry Layout - W3Bits","url":"https://w3bits.com/blog/css-masonry/"},{"title":"Brick by brick: Help us build CSS Masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-update"},{"title":"Introducing CSS Grid Lanes | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/17660/introducing-css-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"CSS Masonry Layout: Native Grid Support","url":"https://www.sitepoint.com/css-masonry-layout-native-grid/"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes","url":"https://247webdevs.blogspot.com/2025/12/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes.html"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found regarding CSS masonry layout specification in 2025-2026:

## Current Status

In 2026, CSS Grid Lanes (formerly known as the masonry proposal) is the native browser answer — and Safari 26 just shipped it first. Level 3 of the CSS grid layout specification defines masonry layout (also known as grid-lanes layout), which is accessed via the display values grid-lanes and inline-grid-lanes.

## Syntax Evolution

The specification has undergone significant changes. The specification settled on the grid-lanes keyword rather than the earlier masonry proposal after years of debate between browser vendors. More specifically, a meeting was held on January 31st of 2025, and it was resolved to reuse grid templating and placement properties for masonry layout.

The earlier syntax using `grid-template-rows: masonry` is no longer the standard. The Firefox-only grid-template-rows: masonry approach doesn't work anymore. It was dropped by CSSWG in favour of CSS Grid Lanes.

## Browser Support (Early 2026)

As of early 2026, CSS Grid Lanes is available in Safari 26 (first to ship). Chrome and Firefox have the feature behind experimental flags and are expected to ship stable support later in 2026. Supported in Safari 26.4+, Grid Lanes are also available as an experimental feature in Chrome and Firefox.

## Modern Implementation

To create the most common masonry layout where the columns are laid out in a grid, and the rows stack like masonry, use display: grid-lanes along with grid-template-columns.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
